content:
# Safaniya Field

**Summary**: A large offshore oil field in the Arabian Gulf.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] focused on the Safaniya reservoir within the Safaniya Field.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] low-relief anticline with NE-SW axial trend

## Formations Present

- [[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997]] Safaniya Member, Khafji Member, Mauddud Member

## Key Findings From This Location

- It is the largest offshore oil field in the world, with a low-relief anticline structure. ([[1997-al-qassab|Al-Qassab, 1997, p. 20]])
